betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Precision Assembler§f is a 3×4×4 multiblock (TilePrecisionAssembler.java:23) used to craft the precise components — §6block coils§f, §6lens blocks§f, §6circuit plates§f, and other AR assemblies — that ordinary crafting tables cannot produce. Its outer shell is §6Structure Blocks§f with a §6Glass§f observation window in the second layer, two §6blockCoil§f (any §6Block of Iron§f or §6Steel Block§f) in the middle bay, two §6Motors§f on the bottom layer, and a §6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3) on the controller face.

§6Production Path (RecipesMachine + TilePrecisionAssembler.java)§f:
- Built via §6Crafting Table§f: 1x §6Redstone Repeater§f, 1x §6Diamond§f, 1x §6Item IO Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:4), 1x §6Machine Structure§f (libvulpes:structuremachine), 1x §6Control Circuit Board§f (advancedrocketry:ic:3), 1x §6Furnace§f, 1x §6Steel Gear§f (libvulpes:productgear:6), 1x §6Dropper§f
- Power: 30 RF/t baseline; recipe `time` is a multiple of 100 ticks per item produced
- JEI category: §6Advanced Rocketry: Precision Assembler§f
- Example recipe (blocklens.json): §61x Iron Rod§f + §63x Lens§f + §63x Glass§f → §61x Lens Block§f at 100 ticks

The Precision Assembler is the single most important crafting multiblock in the mod because both the §6Lens Block§f (10013) and the §6Basic Circuit Plate§f feed the §6Vacuum Laser§f (10014) and §6Precision Laser Etcher§f (10015) that ultimately etch §6Integrated Circuits§f. Combined with the Rolling Machine it produces everything needed to advance past the §6Quartz Crucible§f / §6Crystallizer§f tier.

§eTip§f: The glass observation windows in layer 2 are required for the multiblock to complete — substituting structure blocks breaks the structure. Sneak-right-click the controller to open the GUI and watch the three-stage progress bars for the recipe.
